positive: A minimalist, Scandinavian-style line art drawing of a cup of steaming coffee and a pair of reading glasses on a simple table. The design should be clean, continuous line work, black ink on a white background, simple and elegant, perfect for embroidery or screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, shading, complex colors
